productDisplayName: Femella Women Check Navy Blue Dress
description: Composition Blue sleeveless checked dress, with a round neck, has two welt pockets on the front with satin lining, a concealed zipper at the back and a mildly flaring skirt Fit Regular Wash care Wash dark colours separately Dry inside out Do not bleach or wring Warm iron This dress from femella is styled to become your new day-to-night staple. This versatile piece can be worn with opaque tights and block heels – try wearing with a belt. You can also wear this with a structured jacket, a box clutch and heels for a dressier occasion. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33"
